args.message: Step right up! Feast your eyes on this stunning 2015 BMW 328i Sport. It's been meticulously maintained and, believe me, it runs and drives absolutely beautifully!

args.message: Oh, the fender bender was ages ago, just a quick scrape on the bumper cover, barely noticeable. We replaced it with a brand new one, looks perfect now. You'd never even know. As for mileage, these engines are built to last! With this car's diligent maintenance, you can easily expect to see well over 200,000 miles. It’s a BMW, after all – they’re known for their longevity.
